name: x402 / EIP-3009 USDC Payment
description: Pay any HTTP service or smart contract in USDC using a single signed authorization (EIP-3009 transferWithAuthorization). The cornerstone of agent-native commerce: gasless, atomic, no pre-approval.

steps.description: GET the paid resource. Server responds 402 with X-Payment-Required header (x402 spec).
Re-issue the request with X-Payment: <base64(envelope)>. Server settles via receiveWithAuthorization.

rule.comment: Validator checks USDC.AuthorizationUsed event was emitted with authorizer = agent.
